'''Zham Hlar''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Thaereian system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="Over Thaere" /> The [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Burnout (space station)|Burnout]] was located in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet.<ref name="TAUT">{{LivingForce|Looking In: The Air Up Thaere}}</ref>
